Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Good Faith Determination And Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT AMORE REAL ESTATE, INCORPORATED'S MOTION For Good Faith Determination And Settlement is Granted, for good cause shown. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Good Faith Determination And Settlement
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Continued To Jun-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AMORE REAL ESTATE, INC.'s Motion For Good Faith Determination And Settlement is cContinued to June 3, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Good Faith Determination And Settlement
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs TONI LEONETTI & TONI LEONETTI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE LEONETTI TRUST's Motion For Good Faith Determination And Settlement is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the order that was sent by email. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion For Good Faith Determination And Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TONI LEONETTI, TONI LEONETTI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE LEONETTI TRUST's Motion For Good Faith Determination is off calendar. The motion was served by mail on March 8, 2013 and is untimely by 2 days per CCP 1005 and 12c. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
